nutrient_targets.notes: Increase iron intake to improve haemoglobin levels, reduce protein intake to manage kidney function

hydration_detox_plan.morning_ritual: Drink 1 liter of water with lemon and honey
hydration_detox_plan.during_meals: Drink 1 glass of water with each meal
hydration_detox_plan.evening: Drink 1 glass of warm water with turmeric
